entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Health data source for heart rate and activity syncing

entities.name: workout_tracker
entities.context: Python module for storing and managing workout/health data (heart rate, sleep, daily metrics)

entities.name: sync_recent_activities
entities.context: Function that syncs recent Fitbit activities over a configurable number of days

entities.name: sync_daily_metrics
entities.context: Function that syncs daily resting heart rate and sleep metrics

entities.name: Intraday Heart Rate
entities.context: Granular heart rate samples fetched from Fitbit and stored locally

entities.name: Daily Metrics
entities.context: Aggregated daily health data including resting HR and sleep

relationships.context: Imports and calls workout_tracker to initialize DB and store synced data
Fetches activity data from Fitbit via access token
Calls sync_daily_metrics as a best-effort sub-step
Stores and replaces intraday HR samples per date
Syncs resting HR and sleep data as daily metrics
Heart rate samples sourced from Fitbit
